items.title_en: Euro zone inflation jumps to 3% as economic growth almost stalls
items.title_zh: 经济增长几近停滞 欧元区通胀跃升至3%
items.desc_en: Inflation jumped in April while the euro zone economy expanded a meager 0.1% in the first quarter of the year, data showed on Thursday.
items.desc_zh: 周四的数据显示，4 月份通胀大幅上升，而今年第一季度欧元区经济仅微弱增长 0.1%。

items.desc_zh: 投资者消化了亚马逊、Alphabet等七大巨头的最新季度报告。

items.title_en: Democrats urge CFTC to rein in prediction markets sports betting, insider trading

items.title_en: Jerome Powell says he will continue to serve as a Fed governor, calls Trump criticism 'unprecedented'
items.title_zh: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔表示，他将继续担任美联储理事，称特朗普的批评“史无前例”
items.desc_en: Powell addressed the question of whether he will stay on as a Board of Governors member after his term as chair ends.
items.desc_zh: 鲍威尔谈到了在主席任期结束后是否继续担任理事会成员的问题。

items.title_en: Miaw AI secretary
items.title_zh: Miaw AI secretary
items.desc_en: Non-invasive AI secretary to help without context switching
items.desc_zh: 非侵入式AI秘书无需上下文切换即可提供帮助

items.title_en: Meta looks to report fastest revenue growth since 2021
items.title_zh: Meta 有望报告 2021 年以来最快的收入增长
items.desc_en: In Meta's earnings report after the bell, investors will be monitoring the company's hefty AI spending and whether the war in Iran is having an impact.
items.desc_zh: 在 Meta 盘后的收益报告中，投资者将关注该公司巨额的人工智能支出以及伊朗战争是否产生影响。

items.title_en: Savings rates drop even without Fed cuts. Here’s where you can still earn 4% on your cash
items.title_zh: 即使美联储不降息，储蓄率也会下降。在这里您仍然可以赚取 4% 的现金
items.desc_en: While the Federal Reserve's hold on rate cuts is generally good news for savers, there have already been some banks that have lowered their payouts anyway.
items.desc_zh: 虽然美联储坚持降息对于储户来说通常是个好消息，但已经有一些银行降低了支出。

items.title_en: Comey surrenders over charge of threatening Trump's life in Instagram post
items.title_zh: 科米因在 Instagram 帖子中威胁特朗普生命的指控而自首
items.desc_en: Prosecutors say a 2025 seashell photo posted by the former FBI director was a call for violence against Trump.
items.desc_zh: 检察官称，前联邦调查局局长发布的一张 2025 年贝壳照片是在呼吁对特朗普实施暴力。

items.title_en: Microsoft's earnings report lands after stock's worst quarterly performance since 2008
items.title_zh: 微软财报公布，股价遭遇 2008 年以来最差季度表现
items.desc_en: Microsoft is coming off its worst quarterly stock performance since 2008, partly due to broader market concern that AI will eat software.
items.desc_zh: 微软正在摆脱自 2008 年以来最糟糕的季度股票表现，部分原因是更广泛的市场担心人工智能将吃掉软件。

items.title_en: New images show suspect taking selfies before Washington press dinner shooting
items.title_zh: 新图像显示嫌疑人在华盛顿新闻晚宴枪击事件前自拍
items.desc_en: Prosecutors argue Cole Tomas Allen should remain in custody until trial on a charge of attempted assassination of President Donald Trump.
items.desc_zh: 检察官认为，科尔·托马斯·艾伦应继续被拘留，直至因企图刺杀唐纳德·特朗普总统的指控而受审。

items.title_en: The friendlier the AI chatbot the more inaccurate it is, study suggests
items.title_zh: 研究表明，人工智能聊天机器人越友好，它就越不准确
items.desc_en: Researchers found adjusting AI systems to be more warm and friendly to users would result in an "accuracy trade-off".
items.desc_zh: 研究人员发现，将人工智能系统调整为对用户更加热情和友好会导致“准确性权衡”。

items.title_en: Seven lawsuits filed against OpenAI by families of Canada mass-shooting victims
items.title_zh: 加拿大大规模枪击事件受害者家属对 OpenAI 提起七起诉讼
items.desc_en: The lawsuits, filed in California, accuse OpenAI and Sam Altman of negligence and abetting a mass shooting by failing to flag the suspect's ChatGPT activity.
items.desc_zh: 这些诉讼在加利福尼亚州提起，指控 OpenAI 和 Sam Altman 疏忽大意，未能标记嫌疑人的 ChatGPT 活动，从而煽动大规模枪击事件。

items.title_en: Russia scales back Moscow Victory Day parade, blaming threat from Ukraine
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯缩减莫斯科胜利日阅兵规模，指责乌克兰威胁
items.desc_en: Russia says the annual commemoration of Soviet victory in World War Two will not feature military vehicles or cadets.
items.desc_zh: 俄罗斯表示，苏联在第二次世界大战中胜利的年度纪念活动不会有军用车辆或学员。

items.desc_zh: 关于 OpenAI 的历史和公开承诺的案例可能会对人工智能的未来产生重大影响。

items.desc_zh: AI 聊天和 API 让您的对话完全私密

items.title_en: Social media restrictions for under-16s even if no ban, minister says
items.title_zh: 部长表示，即使没有禁令，对 16 岁以下青少年的社交媒体也有限制
items.desc_en: The government is consulting on changes as a new social media law goes through its final Parliamentary stages.
items.desc_zh: 随着新的社交媒体法进入议会最后阶段，政府正在就修改进行咨询。

items.title_en: Musk v Altman: Why the tech billionaires and former friends are now facing off in court
items.title_zh: 马斯克诉奥特曼：为什么科技亿万富翁和前朋友现在在法庭上对峙
items.desc_en: The battle between the AI big hitters has largely played out on social media. Now it is coming to the courtroom.
items.desc_zh: 人工智能巨头之间的战斗主要在社交媒体上展开。现在它来到了法庭。

items.title_en: Valve's £85 Steam Controller divides gamers ahead of May launch
items.title_zh: Valve 售价 85 英镑的 Steam 控制器在 5 月发布前吸引了玩家
items.desc_en: The pad will be compatible with PCs, Valve's handheld console, the Steam Deck as well as its upcoming gaming PC.
items.desc_zh: 该垫将与 PC、Valve 的手持控制台、Steam Deck 以及即将推出的游戏 PC 兼容。

items.title_en: Why Spotify has no button to filter out AI music
items.title_zh: 为什么Spotify没有过滤AI音乐的按钮
items.desc_en: Music streamer Deezer allows users to filter out AI music, so why does Spotify not offer the same?
items.desc_zh: 音乐流媒体 Deezer 允许用户过滤 AI 音乐，那么为什么 Spotify 不提供同样的服务呢？

items.title_en: China blocks Meta's $2bn acquisition of AI start-up Manus
items.title_zh: 中国阻止 Meta 以 20 亿美元收购人工智能初创公司 Manus
items.desc_en: It comes after months of scrutiny by Chinese regulators over deal struck with Facebook owner.
items.desc_zh: 在此之前，中国监管机构对与 Facebook 所有者达成的交易进行了数月的审查。

items.title_zh: 我把我丈夫带回来参加他的葬礼作为全息图
items.desc_en: After nearly 60 years of marriage, Pam wanted to honour her husband Bill with a hologram at his funeral.
items.desc_zh: 结婚近 60 年后，帕姆想在丈夫比尔的葬礼上用全息图来纪念他。

items.title_en: The viral manifesto of 'anti-woke' tech boss with NHS and defence contracts
items.title_zh: “反觉醒”科技老板与 NHS 和国防合同的病毒宣言
items.desc_en: The boss of the controversial tech company with UK government contracts published a 22-point plan on the future of the West.
items.desc_zh: 这家与英国政府签订合同、备受争议的科技公司的老板发表了一份关于西方未来的 22 点计划。

items.title_en: OpenAI boss 'deeply sorry' for not telling police of mass shooting suspect's account
items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板对没有告诉警方大规模枪击嫌疑人的账户深感抱歉
items.desc_en: Sam Altman on Thursday wrote a brief letter of apology to the people of Tumbler Ridge, Canada in the wake of a January mass shooting.
items.desc_zh: 周四，山姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 在一月份发生大规模枪击事件后，向加拿大塔布勒岭 (Tumbler Ridge) 的人民写了一封简短的道歉信。

items.title_en: UK cyber chiefs say it's time to ditch passwords for passkeys - what are they?
items.title_zh: 英国网络负责人表示，是时候放弃密码而改用万能钥匙了——万能钥匙是什么？
items.desc_en: Passwords have long been the default way we secure accounts online but the NCSC has said passkeys are a better option.
items.desc_zh: 长期以来，密码一直是我们保护在线帐户安全的默认方式，但 NCSC 表示，密钥是更好的选择。
